questions: Was the single-file change to src/tickets/artifacts.ts implemented correctly per the plan?
Are there any deviations from the implementation plan?

answers.answer: Yes. The change adds local TicketDetail/TicketResponse types (lines 18-23) and a combined empty-result block (lines 55-77) to src/tickets/artifacts.ts. The block checks items.length === 0 && stepArtifactSummary.length === 0, resolves the run ID (user-supplied or via ticket-detail fetch), and prints the run ID with a follow-up command suggestion. The success path is structurally untouched.
evidence: src/tickets/artifacts.ts — final file: 78 lines, types at lines 18-23, combined block at lines 55-77

answers.answer: CHK-01 through CHK-05 pass via runtime verification. CHK-06 is partially verified: the normal and no-runs paths both exit 0 (runtime confirmed), and the try/catch for resolution failure is structurally verified by code inspection (no process.exit, no throw, no retry in catch block). The catch path could not be triggered against the staging API without also failing the initial artifacts fetch.
evidence: CHK-01: npx tsc --noEmit — exit 0, zero errors
CHK-03: HLX-65 empty artifacts shows Run ID: cmow2ielf000khb0ugm3grmi2 and follow-up suggestion
CHK-04: --run fake-run-id-12345 echoed exactly in output
CHK-05: HLX-51 and HLX-37 (non-empty) show no Run ID: line (0 matches)
CHK-06: exit code 0 confirmed for empty-result and no-runs paths; catch block verified by inspection

answers.answer: No deviations from the implementation plan. The code follows the plan exactly: local types after ArtifactsResponse, combined empty block appended after existing output, let resolvedRunId scoped within the block, try/catch around ticket-detail fetch, and the specified output format.
evidence: Implementation plan Step 1 — types added at lines 18-23, matching artifact.ts/bundle.ts convention
Implementation plan Step 2 — combined block at lines 55-77, follows specified structure exactly
Implementation plan Step 3 — tsc and npm test both pass cleanly

statement: Implementation complete. Single-file change to src/tickets/artifacts.ts adds run-ID display and follow-up command suggestion in the empty-result path. All quality gates pass (typecheck zero errors, 30/30 tests). Runtime verification against staging API confirms correct behavior for empty results with run ID resolution, explicit --run echo, no-runs handling, and success-path preservation.
